# B;tches Be Bake'n

Small-batch sourdough cottage bakery in Boise, Idaho.

## Business Summary
- Name: B;tches Be Bake'n
- Category: Cottage bakery / sourdough bakery
- Location: Boise, Idaho
- Primary offer: Slow-fermented sourdough breads, rolls, muffins, brownies, cookies, and seasonal bakes
- Fulfillment: Local pickup/meetup, pop-up market pickup, and limited delivery/shipping by arrangement

## Order and Contact
- Primary order page: /order.html
- Menu page: /menu.html
- About + contact page: /about.html
- Phone/Text: 405-999-2071
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61573889138584
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/Bitches.Be.Baken

## Policies and Legal
- Privacy policy: /privacy.html
- Cottage food disclosure appears on-site; products may contain common allergens such as wheat, dairy, eggs, and nuts.

## Canonical Site URL
- https://taeganw.github.io/bitchesbebaken.com/
